channel.title: public on mahmood
channel.description: Recent content in public on mahmood

item.title: calculus
item.description:
\(\DeclareMathOperator{\spn}{span}\) \(\DeclareMathOperator{\dom}{domain}\) \(\DeclareMathOperator{an}{range}\) \(\DeclareMathOperator{ng}{range}\) \(\DeclareMathOperator{\img}{Im}\) \(\DeclareMathOperator{\adj}{adj}\) \(
ewcommand\dif[1]{\:	extrm{d}#1}\) \(\DeclarePairedDelimiter\ceil{\lceil}{ceil}\) \(\DeclarePairedDelimiter loor{\lfloor}{floor}\) \(
ewcommand{\ihat}{\hat{	extbf{\i}}}\) \(
ewcommand{\jhat}{\hat{	extbf{\j}}}\) \(
ewcommand{\khat}{\hat{	extbf{k}}}\) its important to read the exercises provided on every subject because i explain important things with exercises 1 factoring formulas  egin{align} a^2-b^2 &= (a-b)(a+b)\ (a+b)^2 &= a^2+2ab+b^2\ (a-b)^2 &= a^2-2ab+b^2\ ax^2+bx+c &= a(x-x_1)(x-x_2)\ a^3-b^3 &= (a-b)(a^2+b^2+ab)\ a^3+b^3 &= (a+b)(a^2-ab+b^2)\ (a-b)^3 &= a^3-b^3-3ab(a-b)\ (a+b)^3 &= a^3+b^3+3ab(a+b)\ (a+b+c)^3 &= a^3+b^3+c^3+3(a+b)(b+c)(c+a)\  rac{1}{k(k+1)} &=  rac1k -  rac{1}{k+1} \end{align} 2 trigonometric formulas  egin{align} \sin^2{x} + \cos^2{x} &= 1\ \cos 2x &= 2\cos^2 x - 1\ \cos 2x &= 1 - 2\sin^2 x\ \cos 2x &= \cos^2 x - \sin^2 x\ \sin 2x &= 2\sin x \cos x\ 1 + 	an^2 x &=  rac{1}{\cos^2 x}\ 1 + \cot^2 x &=  rac{1}{\sin^2 x} \end{align}
